_comment: Pass it as the first positional argument:
Only the keys you set will override the hard-coded defaults in compare.py.
To capture the actual Rust output, add a tiny driver in
crates/pcbstatorgen-rs/examples/ that prints ForceResult to JSON, e.g.:
Then:  cargo run -p pcbstatorgen-rs --example dump_foc_reference > rust_reference.json
(This README is documentation; compare.py will ignore the _comment key.)
